zh.title: GitHub 技术参考
zh.description: octafuse-gateway 仓库中的权威工程文档：API、迁移、运维与架构。日常使用请优先阅读本站指南。
zh.intro: 以下入口由 sync/contract.json 生成，指向 octafuse-gateway 仓库内的权威技术文档。官网只维护面向使用者的轻量指南；API、部署、迁移、架构和行为语义以 gateway 仓库为准。

en.title: GitHub technical reference
en.description: Canonical engineering docs in octafuse-gateway—APIs, migrations, operations, and architecture. Prefer this site’s guides for day-to-day use.
en.intro: This page is generated from sync/contract.json and points to canonical technical docs in the octafuse-gateway repository. This website keeps user-facing summaries; APIs, deployments, migrations, architecture, and behavior semantics live with gateway code.

description.zh: 按使用者、开发者、运维者和维护者组织的入口。
description.en: Entry points organized by users, developers, operators, and maintainers.

description.zh: Docker 与 Cloudflare 本地 D1 的最小启动路径。
description.en: Minimal Docker and Cloudflare local D1 startup paths.

description.zh: 部署后配置 Provider、Route、用户和 API Key。
description.en: Configure providers, routes, users, and API keys after deployment.

description.zh: 门户、后台或 SaaS 接入 Gateway 的边界、Key 类型和常见流程。
description.en: Boundaries, key types, and common flows for portals, backends, or SaaS integrations.

description.zh: Proxy / Admin 的 Base URL、认证方式和错误形态。
description.en: Proxy/Admin base URLs, authentication, and error shapes.

description.zh: OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini 兼容入口、模型列表、预算状态。
description.en: OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini compatible fronts, model list, and budget state.

description.zh: Provider、模型、路由、用户、密钥、配置和日志自动化接口。
description.en: Automation APIs for providers, models, routes, users, keys, config, and logs.

description.zh: D1、Node + Postgres、Node + MySQL、Docker 和冒烟脚本组合。
description.en: D1, Node + Postgres, Node + MySQL, Docker, and smoke test combinations.

label.zh: 运行时与数据存储架构

description.zh: Cloudflare / Node 与 D1 / Postgres / MySQL 的组合矩阵。
description.en: Cloudflare / Node and D1 / Postgres / MySQL combination matrix.

description.zh: 鉴权、路由、限流、熔断、粘性、failover 和异步记账。
description.en: Auth, routing, rate limits, circuit breakers, stickiness, failover, and async billing.

label.zh: 用户与 API Key 数据模型
label.en: Users and API key data model

description.zh: User、API Key、预算、请求日志和审计日志的关系与约束。
description.en: Relationships and constraints for users, API keys, budgets, request logs, and audit logs.

description.zh: 流式 Chat、客户端取消、usage 解析和扣费状态。
description.en: Streaming chat, client cancellation, usage parsing, and charge state.

description.zh: gpt-image-2 与 Seedream：端点、参数、计费折算与运营验收。
description.en: gpt-image-2 and Seedream: endpoints, parameters, billing conversion, and ops acceptance.

description.zh: UTC 存储、API 输出、Admin 显示和业务日界。
description.en: UTC storage, API output, Admin display, and business day boundaries.

description.zh: Cloudflare、Hybrid、Full self-hosted、MySQL 和 Zeabur 模式总览。
description.en: Overview of Cloudflare, Hybrid, full self-hosted, MySQL, and Zeabur modes.

description.zh: Worker、Admin、D1、Build variables、Workers Builds 和迁移顺序。
description.en: Worker, Admin, D1, Build variables, Workers Builds, and migration order.

description.zh: Docker 镜像、Compose、GHCR、Postgres / MySQL 和 Zeabur 注意事项。
description.en: Docker images, Compose, GHCR, Postgres / MySQL, and Zeabur notes.

description.zh: ETL、对账、灰度、切换和回滚要点。
description.en: ETL, reconciliation, canary, cutover, and rollback notes.

description.zh: Cloudflare 本地、dev 演示和生产 Git 自动部署命令清单。
description.en: Commands for Cloudflare local dev, dev demo, and production Git deploy.

description.zh: Changesets、Version PR、tag、GitHub Release 和 GHCR 镜像。
description.en: Changesets, Version PRs, tags, GitHub Releases, and GHCR images.

label.zh: 文档边界与敏感信息规范

description.zh: 仓内文档分层、官网边界、占位符和禁止值。
description.en: Repository docs layers, website boundaries, placeholders, and forbidden values.

description.zh: 健康检查、用户推理和 Admin 配置接口的最小 curl。
description.en: Minimal curl commands for health, user inference, and Admin config.
